zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret MacLachlan於1177年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾斯特拉拉倫時，她的父親Gillechriosd Gilicrist MacLachlan 1st. Chief of Clan MacLachlan21歲，母親Unknown MacLachlan21歲。她於大約1195年與Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1248年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年71歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾哈坦。

nameMeanings.name: MacLachlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLaughlin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Siobhan, Aileen, Caitlin, Keane, Liam, Padric, Aine, Ciaran, Conan, Conley.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lochlainn ‘son of the Norseman’, from the personal name Lochlann ‘stranger, Norseman’, from a term denoting Scandinavia (possibly ‘land of lakes/fjords’). This was a ruling family in Ulster. See also Laughlin and compare the Scottish form McLachlan .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret MacLachlan was born in 1177, in Stralachlan, Argyll, Scotland, her father, Gillechriosd Gilicrist MacLachlan 1st. Chief of Clan MacLachlan, was 21 and her mother, Unknown MacLachlan, was 21. She married Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn about 1195, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1248, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 71, and was buried in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret MacLachlan est née en 1177, à Stralachlan, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Gillechriosd Gilicrist MacLachlan 1st. Chief of Clan MacLachlan, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Unknown MacLachlan, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn environ 1195, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1248, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Ardchattan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret MacLachlan 1177 in Stralachlan, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gillechriosd Gilicrist MacLachlan 1st. Chief of Clan MacLachlan 21 und ihre Mutter Unknown MacLachlan 21. Sie hat um 1195 in Argyll, Scotland Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1248 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret MacLachlan è nata il nel 1177 nel Stralachlan, Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Gillechriosd Gilicrist MacLachlan 1st. Chief of Clan MacLachlan, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Unknown MacLachlan, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn circa 1195, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1248, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret MacLachlanが1177年にスコットランドアルグイルストララチランで生まれた時，父Gillechriosd Gilicrist MacLachlan 1st. Chief of Clan MacLachlanは21歳，母Unknown MacLachlanは21歳であった。約1195年にスコットランドアルグイルでDonnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1248年にスコットランドアルグイルで71歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアルドチャッタンにて埋葬された。

ko.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret MacLachlan(이)가 1177년 스컷랜드 아그이 스트라라클런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gillechriosd Gilicrist MacLachlan 1st. Chief of Clan MacLachlan(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Unknown MacLachlan(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1195년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1248년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 아드차탠에 묻혔다.

Chief of Clan MacLachlan, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Unknown MacLachlan, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn aproximadamente 1195, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1248, em Argyll, Scotland, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret MacLachlan родилась в 1177 г. в местности стралачлан, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Gillechriosd Gilicrist MacLachlan 1st. Chief of Clan MacLachlan было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Unknown MacLachlan, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn около 1195 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1248 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности ардчаттань, аргилл, Шотландия.
